q: A store sells pencils at 7 for $2. How much do 21 pencils cost, in dollars?
If it takes 5 machines 5 minutes to make 5 widgets, how many minutes for 100 machines to make 100 widgets?
A bat and a ball cost $1.10 together. The bat costs $1.00 more than the ball. How much does the ball cost, in cents?
How many months of the year have 28 days?
A farmer has 17 sheep. All but 9 die. How many sheep are left?
There are 3 apples in a bowl and you take away 2. How many apples do you have?
What is the next term in the sequence 1, 11, 21, 1211, 111221, ...?
A rope ladder hangs over the side of a ship with rungs 1 foot apart, the bottom rung touching the water. The tide rises half a foot per hour. After 6 hours, how many rungs are underwater?
In a race, if you overtake the runner in second place, what place are you now in?
A clock takes 6 seconds to strike 6 o'clock (6 chimes, evenly spaced). How many seconds does it take to strike 12 o'clock?
A snail is at the bottom of a 10-foot well. Each day it climbs up 3 feet; each night it slips back 2 feet. On which day does it first reach the top?
At a party, 12 people each shake hands exactly once with every other person. How many handshakes occur in total?
What is 15% of 80?
A certain number's half is 20 less than the number itself. What is the number?
Two trains are 120 miles apart on the same track, heading toward each other at 30 mph each. How many hours until they meet?
How many diagonals does a hexagon (6-sided polygon) have?
If 3 cats catch 3 mice in 3 minutes, how many cats are needed to catch 100 mice in 100 minutes?
The day before two days after the day before tomorrow is Saturday. What day of the week is today?
A cube is painted on all outer faces, then cut into 27 identical small cubes (a 3 by 3 by 3 arrangement). How many of the small cubes have exactly two painted faces?
In a single-elimination (knockout) tournament with 64 players, how many matches are played in total to determine the champion?
What is the sum of the first 10 positive integers (1 through 10)?
A car travels 60 miles at 30 mph, then another 60 miles at 60 mph. What is its average speed for the entire 120-mile trip, in mph?
How many squares of any size are there on a standard 8 by 8 chessboard?
If 2 typists can type 2 pages in 2 minutes, how many typists are needed to type 18 pages in 6 minutes?
